_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY ANTIGRAVITY FOR MIUUAPI
name: MiuuAPI Node.js
author: miuubyte@gmail.com
description: High-performance API gateway and documentation portal for MiuuAPI. Optimized for Node.js 20+ with automatic git cloning and clustering support.
startup: if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then npm install; fi; node src/index.js

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# MiuuAPI Installation Script

apt update
apt install -y git curl jq

cd /mnt/server

if [ -z "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo -e "\e[32mCloning MiuuAPI repository...\e[0m"
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    
    if [ ! -z "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
        git checkout ${GIT_BRANCH}
    fi
else
    echo -e "\e[33mDirectory not empty. Skipping clone. Updating if possible...\e[0m"
    if [ -d ".git" ]; then
        git pull
    fi
fi

echo -e "\e[32mInstalling dependencies...\e[0m"
npm install --production

echo -e "\e[32mInstallation completed successfully!\e[0m"

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: The URL of the MiuuAPI repository to clone.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The port the API will listen on.
